Wait, earlier the target was at pixels=27, and after RIGHT (avatar toward border/target), it grew to 45. Now after LEFT (avatar away from target), it also grew to 45. So maybe the target grows based on some other factor, or it oscillates.
Let me focus on the main goal. Avatar is at col 42, divider is at col 30-32. I need about 4 more LEFT moves to cross the divider. Let me continue moving LEFT.
